name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exits two when --arch is omitted (usage error per the §25.2 contract)
command: mkdir -p pending/x && printf '%s' '{}' > pending/x/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/x 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'required' out.txt && echo usage 1>&2
